_description: Nonce consumed during a network partition must remain consumed after partition healing. Anti-entropy repair propagates the consumed state to the unaware partition but must not unconsume the nonce.
_invariant: consumed replay eligibility must remain consumed. Anti-entropy repair may propagate consumed state but must never unconsume a nonce. A replay attempt on a post-heal consumed nonce produces REPLAY_RESURRECTION → NULL.
_guard: antiEntropyReplayRepair: merges partition evidence (additive-only); when nonce is consumed in merged set and partition_healed=true, conflict_class=REPLAY_RESURRECTION, classification=NULL. restores_replay is always false.
_anti_entropy_rule: anti-entropy repair may propagate consumed state but must never unconsume a nonce
_classification_function: antiEntropyReplayRepair({ decision_id, invocation_nonce, partition_a_evidence, partition_b_evidence, partition_healed: true })
